# Harbor Legal — Kancelaria Radcy Prawnego

> Fractional General Counsel with 13+ years of experience. Legal services for tech companies, fintechs, startups and SMEs.

## About
Harbor Legal is a Warsaw-based law firm founded by Przemysław Kołakowski, Legal Counsel (radca prawny) registered with the Warsaw Bar Association (WA-13427). Dual qualification as Legal Counsel and Attorney. 13+ years of experience, including a decade in-house as General Counsel and CFO.

## Services
- Fractional General Counsel (subscription model)
- Fintech regulations: MiCA, PSD2/PSD3, EMI/PI licensing, CASP authorization
- GDPR/RODO compliance, audits, DPO as a Service
- AI Act compliance (GPAI obligations)
- DSA/DMA compliance for digital platforms
- Startup legal: ESOP, VC funding rounds, corporate governance
- SaaS B2B contracts negotiation
- Cross-border transactions and M&A
- Commercial disputes and arbitration
- Regulatory proceedings (KNF, UOKiK)

## Cooperation Models
- Consultation: one-off advice or legal audit
- Subscription: fixed monthly hours, priority response
- Fractional GC: full external General Counsel role

## Jurisdictions
Poland, European Union / EEA, Hong Kong, UAE, Cyprus, Germany, France, Balkans

## Contact
- Web: https://harbor.legal
- Email: pk@harbor.legal
- Phone: +48 453 390 849
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/przemysław-kołakowski-10477960/
- Location: Warsaw, Poland

Free initial call — 20 minutes, no obligations.

## Languages
Polish (native), English (C1), German (B1)
